payload.claim_text: The 2026 Work Plan includes agenda items for NYCT Committee meetings from January through December 2026, covering operating results reviews, budget and financial plan adoptions, EEO & Diversity reports, ADA compliance, and committee charter review.
payload.subject: 2026 NYCT Committee Work Plan

payload.claim_text: The 2025 Work Plan continuation covers agenda items from September through December 2026, including budget reviews, mid-year forecasts, public comment sessions, committee charter review, and financial plan adoptions.
